stories.title: Kyle Busch embodied motorsports' greatest complime...
stories.summary: Whether you needed a racer, a throwback to a simpler time, or even a role model, Kyle Busch was the man many in the NASCAR garage looked to.

stories.title: NASCAR icon Kyle Busch dies at the age of 41
stories.summary: Kyle Busch, a two-time Cup Series champion who won more races across the sport's three series than any other driver in history, died at the age of 41.

stories.title: Hart-led Knicks beat Cavs, seize 2-0 series lead
stories.summary: Josh Hart kept shooting and finished with a playoff-career-high 26 points, and the Knicks moved halfway to their first NBA Finals appearance since 1999 by beating the Cavaliers 109-93 on Thursday night.

stories.title: Down 2-0 again, Cavs say task ahead undaunting
stories.summary: Despite a double-digit loss that put them in a 2-0 series hole, the Cavs felt encouraged by how they played in Game 2 and took comfort in the fact that they have erased this deficit before.

stories.title: Sources: Stafford gets 1-year, $55M extension
stories.summary: Reigning NFL MVP Matthew Stafford and the Rams reached agreement on a one-year, $55 million extension, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter. The QB is now tied to L.A. through the 2027 season, with $105 million remaining on his deal.
